ocr_findings.description: The while flowchart diagram (diamond condition box + rectangular process box with loop arrow) replaced with img-0.jpeg reference — expected figure-replacement behavior, no text lost.
The superscript ruby annotation 'ワイル' above 'while' in image is not captured in OCR — acceptable as ruby annotations are typically not transcribed.

reviewer_notes: Page covers elseif syntax continuation and introduces 繰返し処理とwhile. The elseif プログラム例 code block, all while explanatory prose, and the while syntax block (while/処理/endwhile) are accurately captured. Both findings are low-severity figure/annotation omissions.
